recommendations.title: Saint Seiya: The Heated Battle of the Gods
recommendations.overview: Hyoga is missing somewhere in Asgard... When Seiya and the others are looking for him, Athena is kidnapped and they have to rescue her from Dolvar and some mysterious warriors.

recommendations.title: Saint Seiya Heaven Chapter: Overture

recommendations.title: Dragon Ball: The Path to Power
recommendations.overview: A retelling of Dragon Ball's origin with a different take on the meeting of Goku, Bulma, and Kame-Sen'nin. It also retells the Red Ribbon Army story; but this time they find Goku rather than Goku finding them.

recommendations.title: Dragon Ball Z: Broly - The Legendary Super Saiyan
recommendations.overview: While the Saiyan Paragus persuades Vegeta to rule a new planet, King Kai alerts Goku of the South Galaxy's destruction by an unknown Super Saiyan.

recommendations.title: Dragon Ball Z: Fusion Reborn

recommendations.title: Saint Seiya: Warriors of the Final Holy Battle

recommendations.title: Chainsaw Man - The Movie: Reze Arc
recommendations.overview: In a brutal war between devils, hunters, and secret enemies, a mysterious girl named Reze has stepped into Denji's world, and he faces his deadliest battle yet, fueled by love in a world where survival knows no rules.
